description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table or desk with a minimalist design, featuring four straight legs and a flat top surface. The front side has two green drawers with small metallic handles, providing storage space. The rest of the body is finished in a natural wood grain, with the sides and back showing a continuous wood texture. The drawers are flush with the front face, giving the piece a clean and modern appearance. The construction appears sturdy, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, homes, or public spaces. The overall look is functional yet stylish, blending natural wood with a pop of color on the drawers.
description: A modern wooden table or desk with two green drawers and a natural wood finish, supported by four straight legs. The design is clean, functional, and visually appealing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the natural wood finish and a single white panel where the drawers are not visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the thickness of the tabletop, with no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing two green drawers with metallic handles, set into the natural wood frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and tabletop thickness.
